description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof finished in dark gray, complemented by a white chimney protruding from the center. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal light gray siding, and the front facade is defined by a spacious wooden porch that extends across the width of the building. Large windows are present on the front and side, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The porch is supported by simple posts and is accessed by a set of wooden steps. The overall design is clean and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor living space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, light gray siding, and a wide wooden porch spanning the front. Large windows and a central chimney add to its modern, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wooden porch, central steps, and the gable roof with a chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long porch, large front window, and horizontal siding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with horizontal siding and the gable roof's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended porch and additional windows along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
